hooks.command: REPO=$(basename "$PWD") && osascript -e "display notification \"[$REPO] 確認が必要です\" with title \"Claude Code\" sound name \"Ping\"" && code "$PWD"
REPO=$(basename "$PWD") && osascript -e "display notification \"[$REPO] 権限の確認が必要です\" with title \"Claude Code\" sound name \"Ping\"" && code "$PWD"
REPO=$(basename "$PWD") && osascript -e "display notification \"[$REPO] 処理が完了しました\" with title \"Claude Code\" sound name \"Glass\"" && code "$PWD"

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf "%s | ctx: %.0f%%" "$model" "$used"; else printf "%s" "$model"; fi
